Guide

Best Crypto Cards with Cashback

Maximize your crypto rewards with the highest-paying cashback cards. We compare rates, staking requirements, and the true value of each cashback program.

Last updated: March 22, 2026

Cashback Comparison at a Glance

Card Max Rate Free Tier Rate Staking Required Paid In
Crypto.com 8% 1% CRO ($400-$400k) CRO
Binance 8% 0.1% BNB (1-600+) BNB
Wirex 8% 0.5% WXT WXT
Coinbase 4% 1-4% None Choice of crypto
Uphold 4% 1% None Crypto
Plutus 8% 3% PLU (optional) PLU
BitPay 3% 1% None BTC/Crypto
Nexo 2% 0.5% NEXO (for best rates) NEXO/BTC

Understanding Crypto Cashback

Crypto cashback works similarly to traditional card cashback, but with important differences. Instead of receiving dollars or euros back, you receive cryptocurrency. This creates both an opportunity and a risk: if the reward token appreciates, your effective cashback rate increases; if it depreciates, your rewards lose value.

Most crypto card cashback is paid in the platform's native token (CRO for Crypto.com, BNB for Binance, PLU for Plutus, WXT for Wirex). This means your rewards are tied to the performance of that specific token. Coinbase is a notable exception, allowing you to choose which cryptocurrency you receive as cashback.

When evaluating cashback rates, consider the total cost of achieving that rate. A card offering 8% cashback but requiring $400,000 in staking has a very different value proposition than a card offering 3% with no staking requirement. Calculate your expected annual spending and the cashback earned to determine whether the staking requirement makes financial sense for your situation.

Best Free Cashback: Plutus

If you want the highest cashback rate without any staking or paid subscription, Plutus is the clear winner at 3% on its free Starter tier. No other free crypto card comes close to this rate. The Perks marketplace adds further value by reimbursing popular subscriptions. For European users, Plutus offers the best return on spending with zero upfront commitment.

Best Maximum Cashback: Crypto.com

For users willing to stake, Crypto.com offers the best overall cashback package. The Ruby Steel tier at just $400 in CRO staking provides 2% cashback plus a free Spotify subscription (worth approximately $120/year), making the effective return significantly higher. The mid-tier Jade Green/Royal Indigo cards with 3% cashback plus Netflix and Spotify reimbursements offer arguably the best value for active spenders.

All Cards with Cashback Ranked

#1 Editor's Choice

Crypto.com Visa Card

9.5/10

The Crypto.com Visa Card is the gold standard of crypto debit cards, offering tiered cashback rewards up to 8%, free Spotify and Netflix subscriptions, and airport lounge access on higher tiers. Powered by CRO staking, this card turns everyday spending into crypto rewards.

Cashback

Up to 8%

Annual Fee

$0

Cryptos

250+

Regions

US, EU

Visit Crypto.com Read Full Review
#2

Binance Card

9.2/10

The Binance Card lets you spend crypto directly from your Binance account with up to 8% cashback when holding BNB. Zero fees for transactions and real-time crypto-to-fiat conversion make this a top contender for Binance users.

Cashback

Up to 8%

Annual Fee

$0

Cryptos

15+

Regions

EU, UK

#3

Wirex Card

8.5/10

Wirex offers a multi-currency card supporting both crypto and traditional currencies with built-in exchange. X-Accounts earn interest on idle balances, and the Cryptoback rewards program gives back up to 8% in WXT tokens.

Cashback

Up to 8%

Annual Fee

$0 (Standard), $30/yr (Premium)

Cryptos

50+

Regions

EU, UK

Visit Wirex Read Full Review
#4

Coinbase Card

9/10

The Coinbase Card offers 4% crypto cashback on all purchases, powered by one of the most trusted names in crypto. Available in the US and EU, it converts your crypto to fiat at point of sale with transparent fees.

Cashback

Up to 4%

Annual Fee

$0

#5

Uphold Card

8/10

The Uphold Card leverages the Uphold multi-asset platform, allowing you to spend from crypto, fiat, precious metals, and even US equities. A unique anything-in, anything-out philosophy makes it the most versatile crypto card.

The BitPay Card offers instant crypto-to-fiat conversion with no annual fees. One of the longest-standing crypto card providers, BitPay delivers a reliable, straightforward way to spend Bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies.

#7

Plutus Card

8.3/10

Plutus takes a decentralized approach to crypto rewards. Earn PLU tokens on every purchase with no staking required on the free tier. The unique Perks marketplace lets you earn additional cashback at selected retailers.

Cashback

3% (free tier) up to 8%

Annual Fee

$0 (Starter), $5-$15/mo (Premium)

Cryptos

Regions

EU, UK

#8

Nexo Card

8.7/10

The Nexo Card lets you spend without selling your crypto. Instead of converting your holdings, it extends a credit line backed by your crypto collateral, so you can spend while your portfolio continues to grow.

Revolut Card

8.8/10

Revolut is not a crypto-native card, but its premium Metal card offers excellent crypto trading features alongside traditional banking. With exposure to 100+ cryptocurrencies, cashback, and a polished app, it bridges TradFi and DeFi.
